message:
feat(agent): implement pt agent report command (to7r)

Add the `pt agent report` command for generating HTML reports from session
data or .ptb bundles.

CLI Options:
- --session <id> / --bundle <path>: Input source
- --out <path>: Output file (default: stdout)
- --profile minimal|safe|forensic: Redaction level
- --galaxy-brain: Include full math ledger
- --embed-assets: Inline CDN assets for offline viewing
- --format html|slack|prose: Output format
- --prose-style terse|conversational|formal|technical
- --theme light|dark|auto
- --title: Custom report title

Changes:
- Add pt-report as optional dependency behind `report` feature
- Add AgentReportArgs struct with all CLI options
- Add Report variant to AgentCommands enum
- Implement run_agent_report, generate_report_from_session
- Add generate_slack_summary, generate_prose_summary helpers
- Export ReportData and add config() accessor to ReportGenerator

Note: Build verification blocked by unrelated myopic_policy.rs errors
(tracked in process_triage-88qp).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
